content:
# SurgeonValue — The invisible partner for the 1-NPI surgeon.
Tagline: Your AI already knows your OR schedule.

## FOR THE 1-NPI SURGEON  ·  2026
Your AI already knows
your OR schedule.

It's 6:47 a.m. You're scrubbing in. Wonder Bill flagged the three patients on your panel where you're leaving CCM revenue on the table. Your prior auths from yesterday are signed and sent. That's SurgeonValue.

## THE MATH
$962 → $1,820 per case.

Codes you're already entitled to. Documentation you already have to do. Just routed through a physician-governed AI harness.

- 89%: Uplift on codes you're already entitled to
- $171,600: Recovered per year (200 cases × $858)
- 12: Captured encounters to break even on $999/yr
## TEN AGENTS  ·  ONE PRACTICE
Ten agents. Nine pipes to patient.

- 01 · Wonder Bill: “I wonder if I can bill for this?” Code-stacking and missed-revenue agent.
- 02 · Prior Auth: Paste a note → 60-second letter. Best single-demo agent.
- 03 · Encounter Ledger: Every encounter logged, NPI-linked, FHIR Provenance.
- 04 · Panel Scan: Flags CCM-eligible patients on your panel.
- 05 · PROM follow-up: Voice + text outcomes capture for TEAM/ACCESS compliance.
- 06 · Front Door: Surgeon profile + intake. Replaces the $500K patient portal.
- 07 · EMR Onboarding: Epic · Cerner · athena · eCW · ModMed connectors.
- 08 · Compliance: OIG / Stark / AKS guard-rails baked into the harness.
- 09 · Specialty Demand: Where your panel needs second opinions.
- 10 · Lost-Revenue Dash: First thing surgeons see at signup — concrete dollars.
## THE HARD INTERCEPT
Every output physician-attested before release.

Provisional patent filed April 6 2026. Federally defensible attestation chain.

- 01 · Draft: LLM generates the LMN, prior auth, or note in the harness.
- 02 · 90-second floor: Viewport visibility + input monitoring. Anti-rubber-stamp.
- 03 · Sign + hash: NPI-bound digital signature. SHA-256 to hashcare ledger.
## ONE SURGEON  ·  ONE WEEK
Levonti installed it from a 60-second iMessage.

First organic install in Claude Desktop with unsolicited "Invisible Partner" product copy. April 6, 2026.

## FOUNDING SURGEON OFFER
$499/yr locked. 200 spots.

Levonti and Derek Stanford are using it now. The next 200 surgeons get the same price for three years.

- $499: Founding-member tier · 3-year lock
- $999: Member · $15-25 per captured encounter
- $0: What you pay for code-stacking expertise
## THE ASK
Send one iMessage. Install in 60 seconds.

One MCP install. One ledgered encounter. One Wonder Bill output. That's the demo.
